sentences.en: I wake up at seven o'clock every morning.
First, I brush my teeth and wash my face.
Then I take a quick shower.
I get dressed and comb my hair.
After that, I go to the kitchen.
I make breakfast for my family.
We usually eat toast and eggs.
I drink coffee with milk.
My children drink orange juice.
We talk about our plans for the day.
Breakfast time is always nice.
At eight-thirty, I leave for work.
I drive my car to the office.
The drive takes about twenty minutes.
I listen to music in the car.
Sometimes I listen to the news.
I work from nine to five.
I have many meetings during the day.
I eat lunch with my coworkers.
We go to a restaurant near our office.
I usually order a salad or sandwich.
After lunch, I feel more energetic.
I finish work at five o'clock.
I drive home through the city.
Traffic is usually heavy in the evening.
I arrive home around six o'clock.
My family is happy to see me.
We prepare dinner together.
My wife cooks the main dish.
I help with the vegetables.
Our children set the table.
We eat dinner at seven o'clock.
We share stories about our day.
After dinner, we relax together.
Sometimes we watch TV.
The children do their homework.
I help them when they need it.
We also play games together.
At ten o'clock, we get ready for bed.
The children brush their teeth.
I read them a bedtime story.
They go to sleep at ten-thirty.
I read a book before sleeping.
My wife and I talk about tomorrow.
We go to bed at eleven o'clock.
I feel happy about my daily life.
